attacking_style: Does not appear to be a primary attacker; focuses on strong positioning through finales to contest sprints, but lacks explosive acceleration in final 50 meters.
team_tactics: Insufficient data on team support structure; appears to rely on individual positioning skills rather than coordinated lead-out trains.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint finales where positioning matters more than pure top-end speed; struggles when numerical superiority or technical corners are factors.
vulnerability: Final 50m acceleration deficit prevents winning against pure sprinters; susceptible to being boxed in at technical corners when outnumbered, particularly when lacking teammates for positioning support.
key_patterns: Strong positioning through finales but unable to convert to victories (2 observations)
Vulnerable to tactical isolation: boxed in when numerical disadvantage exists (2 observations)
Lacks explosive final-meters acceleration despite reaching strong positions (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistent podium positioning shows good tactical awareness, but repeated inability to convert suggests fundamental speed limitation rather than declining form
